name: Awakening Bar & Grill

notes: The current owner page publishes 51 raw cards across three visible menu grids; one $2 OFF promotion is not a product, leaving 50 current presentations.
All 48 frozen rows reconcile exactly once: 42 exact, one mixed-service variant, and five extraction artifacts. Seven current presentations were omitted from the frozen output.
Post-repair recheck pins 50 unique current presentations from three owner-published menu grids, with the one discount promotion excluded and beverages last.
All 48 frozen rows remain reconciled exactly once: 42 exact, one mixed-service variant, and five artifacts; seven current presentations were restored.
The owner menu provides narrative product descriptions but no allergen matrix, negative claims, or cross-contact disclosure.

Thirty-one current presentations have explicit positive ingredients or unavoidable food identities; nineteen remain unavailable. Nineteen matched frozen arrays over-promoted formulation assumptions or omitted an explicit positive signal.
Thirty-one rows preserve narrow explicit owner-menu positives and nineteen remain unavailable; all may-contain arrays are empty because no cross-contact disclosure was published.
Nineteen frozen allergen/source outcomes were corrected without promoting bread, wrapper, sauce, pasta, batter, or other formulation knowledge into official claims.

The generic extraction promoted four homepage/employment cards and one dessert description to products, corrupted seven real descriptions, omitted Braised Kale and Bourbon Bread Pudding, and collapsed repeated cross-menu presentations.

The current linked SpotApps endpoint is HTTP 200 corroboration but has shopping_cart_active=false and exposes an additional hidden catalog; only the three owner-published menu tabs define the canonical boundary.
The dedicated parser scopes descriptions to each menu-item holder, preserves numeric source IDs and service contexts, rejects promotions, and never attaches section-level add-protein text to an item.
The inactive linked-vendor extra catalog remains corroboration only and is not treated as an owner-published active menu.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current restaurant-issued identity page and confirmed the promotional and employment artifacts.
Captured the three current owner-published menu grids with 51 raw cards and 50 publishable presentations.
Captured HTTP 200 restaurant-linked vendor corroboration; excluded a hidden/deactivated extra catalog from the canonical boundary.

findings.summary: Five frozen rows are promotional/employment content or a nested dessert description rather than products.
findings.resolution: Removed all five frozen artifacts and restored Bourbon Bread Pudding with its description nested correctly.

findings.summary: The frozen output omitted seven current presentations, collapsed repeated cross-menu offerings, and mixed the two Chicken & Waffles service contexts.
findings.resolution: Pinned all 50 current owner-published presentations with surface-aware IDs and distinct Lunch & Dinner, Brunch, and Happy Hour contexts.

findings.summary: Seven real frozen rows contain truncated, missing, cross-associated, or section-level text instead of their current item descriptions.
findings.resolution: Reparsed item-scoped descriptions and guarded against section-level text association.

findings.summary: Nineteen matched frozen rows contain direct allergen/source outcomes inconsistent with the conservative explicit-positive semantics supported by the owner menu.
findings.resolution: Corrected all nineteen rows, retaining only explicit owner-menu positives and leaving all other direct and cross-contact status unavailable.

repairs.summary: Verified the 50-presentation current menu boundary, item descriptions, service scopes, source authority, 31/19 evidence split, and empty cross-contact semantics.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern="Awakening preserves current service presentations" scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Terra low research was escalated to Sol medium; coordinator review retained the extraction findings but corrected the overbroad claim that all owner-description positives must remain unavailable.
Targeted catalog/reconciliation suite passed 6/6 and generated-data regression passed 1/1.
Generated snapshot counts: 50 total; 31 official ingredient-positive; 19 unavailable; 0 may-contain.
